commands.review_summary:
The PR changes QQBot outbound dispatch to send streaming-enabled text-only tool progress immediately as forced plain text, threads a `forcePlainText` option through QQBot text sending, and adds dispatcher regression tests.

PR surface: Source +99, Tests +119. Total +218 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main buffers text-only `kind: "tool"` payloads and clears the tool fallback timer when a later block response arrives. I did not run tests in this read-only review.
